summary: Notification preferences feature fully tested. Backend (19/19 tests pass) and Frontend (UI fully functional). GET /api/auth/me returns notification_prefs defaults, PUT saves correctly, UI shows 3 toggles with working save+toast.
passed_tests: GET /api/auth/me returns notification_prefs field with all 3 keys (messages, services, news)
GET /api/auth/me returns boolean values for all notification_prefs keys
PUT /api/auth/notification-prefs returns 200 with notification_prefs object
PUT sets messages=False and persists correctly
PUT sets services=False and persists correctly
PUT sets news=False and persists correctly
PUT all=False allowed and persisted
Preferences persist to DB (verified via GET /api/auth/me after PUT)
PUT without auth returns 401/403
Partial body defaults: missing keys default to True (body.get key, True)
Disabling messages reflected in /api/auth/me - send_push_notification will skip user
Disabling services reflected in /api/auth/me - broadcast push will skip user
Disabling news reflected in /api/auth/me - news broadcast will skip user
Admin prefs restored to all True after all tests
Profile page loads without errors
Notification prefs card visible in Profile tab (data-testid=notification-prefs-card)
3 Switch toggles visible: notif-toggle-messages, notif-toggle-services, notif-toggle-news
All toggles default to 'checked' state (matches default_prefs all True)
Messages toggle toggles correctly to unchecked on click
News toggle toggles correctly to unchecked on click
Save button click shows success toast 'Nastavení oznámení uloženo!'
Saved preferences (messages=False, news=False, services=True) correctly persisted in DB
Preferences restored to all True after test cleanup
critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: send_broadcast_push_notification builds disabled_ids via async for loop inside utils.py - this is correct and uses MongoDB query filtering {notification_prefs.{pref_key}: False} which is performant
MINOR: user_response_dict in auth_helpers.py correctly includes notification_prefs with default {messages:True, services:True, news:True} for users without prefs set
MINOR: The _PREF_KEY mapping message->messages, service->services, news->news is correctly implemented
seed_data_creation: None - admin prefs restored to all True after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification preferences feature fully working. Backend: PUT /api/auth/notification-prefs saves to MongoDB, GET /api/auth/me returns defaults. Frontend: notification-prefs-card in Profile tab with 3 switches (notif-toggle-messages, notif-toggle-services, notif-toggle-news) and save-notif-prefs-btn. Push filtering in utils.py uses _PREF_KEY mapping. Admin credentials: test1@bloom.cz / test123. Use token injection via localStorage for Playwright tests (rate limiter can block repeated form logins).
